page_content:
The Bachelor of Arts Degree in Music (BA)

Designed for qualiﬁed students whose interests include a broader liberal arts experience. The College of Arts and Humanities requirement of 45 3xx or 4xx-level credits and the Global Engagement Requirement apply to all B.A. students. B.A. degree programs are offered in the following: Piano, Voice, Violin, Viola, Cello, Bass, Flute, Oboe, Clarinet, Bassoon, Saxophone, Horn, Trumpet, Trombone, Tuba, Euphonium, Percussion, Harp and Jazz Studies.
